data.title: Edgewater Wireless plans to extend warrants to buy 8.33M shares via TSXV application. Private placement closed in two tranches.
data.description: Edgewater Wireless Systems Inc. plans to apply to the TSX Venture Exchange to extend the expiry date of 8,330,000 outstanding share purchase warrants. These warrants were issued as part of a non-brokered private placement that closed in two tranches. The holders of these warrants are entitled to acquire common shares of the company.

data.title: ITT to acquire SPX FLOW, expanding leadership in engineered components, per definitive agreement.
data.description: Stamford, Connecticut - ITT, a prominent supplier of advanced critical components, revealed its definitive agreement to purchase SPX FLOW.

data.title: Connected car security market to reach $6.99 billion by 2032, with CAGR of 11.0%, up from $3.37 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, it was reported on December 5, 2025 that the connected car security market is expected to increase significantly, reaching a value of $6.99 billion by 2032 from $3.37 billion in 2025, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 11.0%. A total of 280 market data Tables and 100 Figures are included in the report, which spans across 320 Pages.

data.title: Castelion secures $350M funding to mass produce U.S. hypersonic weapons, meeting Pentagon's top priority.
data.description: Castelion, a leading defense technology company based in Torrance, California, announced on December 5, 2025, that it has secured significant funding to expedite the expansion of U.S. manufacturing capabilities. The funding will fuel the scaled production of affordable hypersonic weapons, addressing the Pentagon's top priority. This investment enables Castelion to contribute to enhancing America's conventional deterrence.

data.title: Watch Out Group secures $100M CAD funding to expand AI-Native Autonomous Micro-Factories, revolutionizing manufacturing.
data.description: A company headquartered in Montreal, Watch Out Group, unveiled a groundbreaking manufacturing approach on December 5, 2025. The company introduced an AI-native Autonomous Micro-Factory platform, revolutionizing the production of mission-critical components. In a recent development, Watch Out Group successfully concluded a financing phase, marking a significant milestone in its journey. This pioneering initiative is poised to reshape the manufacturing sector, securing substantial investments and indicating promising growth prospects.

data.title: Nov. 2025 roundup of 11 finance press releases including acquisitions, The Economist's 2026 predictions, and ADP employment data.
data.description: Summary of significant financial updates from PR Newswire, featuring numerous notable acquisitions, The Economist's forecast for 2026, and private sector job figures released by ADP. The data was announced in New York on December 5, 2025. The press releases covered various industry sectors, with a focus on mergers and acquisitions. The Economist's predictions for 2026 included analysis on global economic trends. Additionally, ADP's latest employment data offered insights into private sector job growth numbers. Overall, the news highlights the dynamic nature of the financial landscape and provides valuable insights for investors and businesses navigating the market.

data.title: Gundry MD Bio Complete 3 wins 2025 Nourish Awards for Supplements, recognized for probiotics, prebiotics, and postbiotics.
data.description: A cutting-edge gut health formula named Bio Complete 3™ has been recognized for its unique combination of probiotics, prebiotics, and postbiotics, aiding in digestion, boosting energy levels, and enhancing overall well-being. The award was given to Gundry MD® in Los Angeles on December 5, 2025, showcasing the product's effectiveness in promoting gut health. Bio Complete 3™ received a 2-Star recognition for its innovative blend, highlighting its significance in the market.

data.title: Tech news highlights from November: Citi-Swift trial, Axon acquires Carbyne, POET-QCi collaboration. NYC, Dec. 5, 2025.
data.description: In a recent report from PR Newswire, several significant tech developments were highlighted in New York on December 5, 2025. Firstly, Citi and Swift conducted a groundbreaking trial, capturing attention for its innovative approach. Additionally, Axon made waves by acquiring Carbyne to revolutionize the emergency response system, particularly 911 services. Furthermore, POET Technologies and QCi forged a partnership, signifying the importance of collaboration in the tech industry. These announcements showcase the ever-evolving landscape of technology and its impact on various sectors.
